title: Send Daily Digest at 10:00 AM
prerequisites: 1. System scheduler is active
steps: 1. Simulate the system time reaching 10:00 AM on a standard workday
expectedResult: The system automatically generates and dispatches the Daily Digest summary email to all configured users

title: Do not send Daily Digest on weekends
prerequisites: 1. System scheduler is active
steps: 1. Simulate the system time reaching 10:00 AM on a Saturday or Sunday
expectedResult: The system suppresses the Daily Digest and no summary email is sent

title: Digest for Department Head / Central Admin includes all projects
prerequisites: 1. User is configured as Department Head ("ผู้อำนวยการ สบง") or Central Admin ("สารบรรณ")
steps: 1. Trigger and open the Daily Digest email for this user
expectedResult: The metrics and project counts in the email reflect *all* projects across the entire system

title: Digest for Unit Head includes only workgroup projects
prerequisites: 1. User is configured as Unit Head ("หัวหน้ากลุ่มงาน")
steps: 1. Trigger and open the Daily Digest email for this user
expectedResult: The metrics and project counts are strictly limited to the projects assigned to the user's specific workgroup

title: Digest for Procurement Staff includes only assigned projects
prerequisites: 1. User is configured as Procurement Staff ("เจ้าหน้าที่พัสดุ")
steps: 1. Trigger and open the Daily Digest email for this user
expectedResult: The metrics and project counts are strictly limited to the specific projects directly assigned to this user

title: Digest content (New Tasks)
prerequisites: 1. A Daily Digest email has been generated
steps: 1. Open the content of the Daily Digest email
expectedResult: The email contains a dedicated section for New Tasks ("งานที่เพิ่มใหม่") detailing projects added or keyed within the last 24 hours

title: Digest content (Completed Tasks)
prerequisites: 1. A Daily Digest email has been generated
steps: 1. Open the content of the Daily Digest email
expectedResult: The email contains a dedicated section for Completed Tasks ("งานที่แล้วเสร็จ") based on the completed system status

title: Digest content (Pending Tasks)
prerequisites: 1. A Daily Digest email has been generated
steps: 1. Open the content of the Daily Digest email
expectedResult: The email contains a dedicated section for Pending Tasks ("งานคงค้าง") for projects currently in progress

title: Digest content (Urgent Tasks)
prerequisites: 1. A Daily Digest email has been generated
steps: 1. Open the content of the Daily Digest email
expectedResult: The email contains a dedicated section for Urgent Tasks ("งานเร่งด่วน") encompassing all urgent levels

title: Send email to Vendor immediately
prerequisites: 1. A project requires vendor acknowledgment/signing
steps: 1. Click the button to trigger the Vendor notification alert
expectedResult: The system immediately generates and dispatches an email to the Vendor ("ผู้ค้า") without waiting for a scheduler

title: Vendor email content includes mandatory fields
prerequisites: 1. The system has sent a Vendor Signing Alert
steps: 1. Open the alert email sent to the Vendor
expectedResult: The email explicitly includes the Project Name ("ชื่อโครงการ"), PO Number ("เลขที่ใบสั่งซื้อ (PO Number)"), and a direct link or instructions to proceed

title: Enable automated reminders
prerequisites: 1. User is configuring Contract Step 1
steps: 1. Select the option to enable automated notification reminders for the step
expectedResult: The system saves the configuration and activates the automated reminder schedule for this project

title: Send reminder 3 days before Due Date
prerequisites: 1. Automated reminders are enabled for a project
steps: 1. Simulate the system date reaching exactly 3 days before the configured Due Date
expectedResult: The system successfully triggers and sends the 3-day reminder email

title: Send reminder 5 days before Due Date
prerequisites: 1. Automated reminders are enabled for a project
steps: 1. Simulate the system date reaching exactly 5 days before the configured Due Date
expectedResult: The system successfully triggers and sends the 5-day reminder email

title: Send reminder 7 days before Due Date
prerequisites: 1. Automated reminders are enabled for a project
steps: 1. Simulate the system date reaching exactly 7 days before the configured Due Date
expectedResult: The system successfully triggers and sends the 7-day reminder email

title: Send reminder 15 days before Due Date
prerequisites: 1. Automated reminders are enabled for a project
steps: 1. Simulate the system date reaching exactly 15 days before the configured Due Date
expectedResult: The system successfully triggers and sends the 15-day reminder email

title: Send reminder to all 3 specific groups
prerequisites: 1. A reminder email is triggered
steps: 1. Inspect the recipients of the dispatched reminder email
expectedResult: The email is successfully delivered to the Inspection Committee ("กรรมการตรวจรับ"), Contract Staff ("ผู้รับผิดชอบงานบริหารสัญญา"), and the Vendor ("ผู้ค้า")

title: Committee notification list boundary check (max 17)
prerequisites: 1. User is assigning an Inspection Committee ("คณะกรรมการตรวจรับ")
steps:
1. Register a committee of 17 members
2. Trigger delivery submission
3. Attempt to register an 18th member and trigger
expectedResult:
1. 17 members successfully receive the email notification.
2. The 18th member addition fails or the system warns about the hard limit of 17 members.

title: SMTP load limit compliance
prerequisites: 1. A load testing tool or bulk script is prepared
testData: High notification volume (e.g., 3000 projects/year, averaging 12 steps each)
steps: 1. Simulate a massive burst of notification triggers pushing the high volume load
expectedResult: The Mail queue handles the emails gracefully without dropping connections or triggering SMTP timeouts

title: Show notifications within 7 days
prerequisites: 1. User has notifications older and newer than 7 days
steps: 1. Open the Web Notification Page
expectedResult: The system displays exclusively the notification items that were generated within the last 7 days

title: Hide notifications older than 7 days
prerequisites: 1. User has notifications older than 7 days
steps: 1. Open the Web Notification Page
expectedResult: Any notification items older than 7 days are automatically hidden from the view

title: Real-time notification
prerequisites: 1. User is logged into the application
steps: 1. Trigger a designated system event
expectedResult: The system successfully sends and displays the web notification in real-time without requiring a page refresh

title: Unread indicator
prerequisites: 1. User has new unread notifications
steps: 1. Open the notification list
expectedResult: Unread notification items are prominently marked with a distinct indicator dot

title: Click mark as read
prerequisites: 1. User has an unread notification
steps: 1. Click on the specific unread notification item
expectedResult: The notification status changes to Read ("อ่านแล้ว") and navigates the user to the relevant page

title: Mark all as read
prerequisites: 1. User has multiple unread notifications
steps: 1. Click the "Mark all as read" button
expectedResult: All unread notification items are instantly changed to Read ("อ่านแล้ว") status

title: Staff receives only their own tasks
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Staff
steps: 1. Open the Web Notification Page
expectedResult: The user strictly sees notifications only for projects where they are assigned as the person in charge

title: Notifications within authorization scope
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as a Manager/Unit Head
steps: 1. Open the Web Notification Page
expectedResult: The user successfully sees notifications for all projects falling under their authorization scope

title: Trigger: New task assigned
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in and awaiting assignment
steps:
1. Trigger a new project assignment event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the To-Do ("ต้องดำเนินการ") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Assignment Page

title: Trigger: Vendor submitted document
prerequisites: 1. A vendor submits a document for a project
steps:
1. Trigger the vendor submission event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the To-Do ("ต้องดำเนินการ") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Vendor Response page

title: Trigger: Task sent back for revision / Finance revision
prerequisites: 1. A task is sent back for revision by a higher-up or Finance
steps:
1. Trigger the revision event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the To-Do ("ต้องดำเนินการ") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Project ID Page

title: Trigger: Approaching deadline, 7 days before deadline at 10:00 AM
prerequisites: 1. A project is 7 days away from its deadline
steps:
1. Simulate the system time to 10:00 AM on the 7-day mark
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the To-Do ("ต้องดำเนินการ") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Project ID Page

title: Trigger: Approve/Sign phase
prerequisites: 1. A project enters the Approval/Signing phase
steps:
1. Trigger the approval event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the FYI ("รับทราบ") tab. Clicking it results in No Navigation (Opens item only)

title: Trigger: Approve/Reject project cancellation
prerequisites: 1. A project cancellation request is processed
steps:
1. Trigger the approve/reject cancellation event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the FYI ("รับทราบ") tab. Clicking it results in No Navigation (Opens item only)

title: Trigger: Change/add person in charge
prerequisites: 1. The assigned person for a project is modified
steps:
1. Trigger the change of person in charge event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the FYI ("รับทราบ") tab. Clicking it results in No Navigation (Opens item only)

title: Trigger: Project awaiting approval
prerequisites: 1. A project is submitted and awaiting approval
steps:
1. Trigger the awaiting approval status
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the All ("ทั้งหมด") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Project ID Page

title: Trigger: Project cancellation request
prerequisites: 1. A user submits a request to cancel a project
steps:
1. Trigger the cancellation request event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the All ("ทั้งหมด") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Project ID Page

title: Trigger: Project status ready for signature
prerequisites: 1. A project shifts to the ready for signature state
steps:
1. Trigger the status change event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the All ("ทั้งหมด") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Project ID Page

title: Trigger: Project status sent to finance
prerequisites: 1. A project is forwarded to the Finance department
steps:
1. Trigger the finance submission event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the All ("ทั้งหมด") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Project ID Page

title: Trigger: Acting appointment
prerequisites: 1. An acting appointment is assigned to a user
steps:
1. Trigger the acting appointment event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the FYI ("รับทราบ") tab. Clicking it results in No Navigation (Opens item only)

title: Trigger: Unused budget plan 7 days before end date
prerequisites: 1. An unused budget plan is exactly 7 days before expiration
steps:
1. Trigger the 7-day expiration warning event
2. Click the incoming web notification
expectedResult: The notification categorizes under the All ("ทั้งหมด") tab, and clicking it navigates directly to the Home Page

title: Unused budget plan notification count check
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Unit Representative
steps:
1. Check notification bar count of unused budget plans
2. Create a project for one budget plan
3. Re-check the count
expectedResult: The notification count displays the correct count of unused plans, and decreases by exactly 1 after project creation

title: Notification deduplication for assignment event
prerequisites: 1. User is assigned a project
steps:
1. Assign a project to the user
2. Verify the notification list count and web alert triggers
expectedResult: Only one single notification is created and sent; duplicate triggers for the exact same event are ignored
